$comment: Project-versioned Claude Code config. Local overrides go in settings.local.json (gitignored).

hooks.command: bash -c 'F=.health/last-run.txt; if [ ! -f "$F" ] || [ $(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -f %m "$F" 2>/dev/null || stat -c %Y "$F" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) )) -gt 604800 ]; then nohup bash scripts/health.sh > /dev/null 2>&1 & fi'
bash -c 'F=.health/last-run.txt; M=.health/.last-seen-marker; if [ -f "$F" ]; then if [ ! -f "$M" ] || [ "$F" -nt "$M" ]; then echo "--- last health audit ---"; cat "$F"; touch "$M"; fi; fi'
